title: Approval of the application for Provisional License. The Department
content: 16 shall approve the application for a provisional license after the applicant has satisfied all 17 the requirements. 18 19 The Department shall issue a provisional license which shall be valid within a non- 20 extendible period of three (3) years from the date of issuance. 21 22
